entries.title: Minecraft 1.21.9 version-change sources
entries.summary: Authoritative version-change evidence should combine NeoForged primers for loader migration notes with misode technical-changes markdown for vanilla data and resource format changes.

entries.title: NeoForged 1.21.9 primer
searchTerms: The Separation of Engines and Resources

metadata.preview:
Minecraft 1.21.8 -> 1.21.9 Mod Migration Primer

This is a high level, non-exhaustive overview on how to migrate your mod from 1.21.8 to 1.21.9. This does not look at any specific mod loader, just the changes to the vanilla classes. All provided names use the official mojang mappings.

This primer is licensed under the [Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International](http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/), so feel free to use it as a reference and leave a link so that other readers can consume the primer.

If there's any incorrect or missing information, please file an issue on this repository or ping @ChampionAsh5357 in the Neoforged Discord server.

Thank you to:

- @Soaryn for pointing out some non-recommended rendering usages

- @Deximus-Maximus for some typos

Pack Changes

There are a number of user-facing changes that are part of vanilla which are not discussed below that may be relevant to modders. You can find a list of them on [Misode's version changelog](https://misode.github.io/versions/?id=1.21.9&tab=changelog).

The Debugging Overhaul

The entirety of the debug system has been completely overhauled, from exposing the internal debugging tools to the debug screen.

entries.title: misode 1.21.9-pre1 technical changes
entries.summary: pack breaking obsolete | Data pack format has been increased to 87.1.

metadata.preview:
pack breaking obsolete | Data pack format has been increased to 87.1.

entity | Mannequins can now have configurable description text via the description field.

entity | Mannequins now accept profile component from spawner items.

command | The spawnpoint and setworldspawn commands now accept an optional pitch argument.

command | The setworldspawn command is no longer limited to the overworld and can now set world spawn in any dimension, including the Nether.

command | Server commands now run from the respawn dimension by default instead of always the overworld.

command | The fetchprofile command now prints clickable text to summon a mannequin with the resolved profile.

component | The profile component can now have additional fields that override values used for rendering: texture, cape, elytra, and model.

entity breaking | Changed player entity respawn object structure. The angle field has been renamed to yaw and is now required.

entity breaking | Added required pitch field to player entity respawn object.

entity breaking | The dimension field in player entity respawn object is now required.

loot | The copy_name loot function source field now accepts direct_attacker, tar

entries.title: misode 1.21.9-pre2 technical changes
entries.summary: pack breaking obsolete | Data pack format has been increased to 88.0.

metadata.preview: pack breaking obsolete | Data pack format has been increased to 88.0.

entries.title: misode 25w31a technical changes
entries.summary: pack | Pack versions now have minor versions

metadata.preview:
pack | Pack versions now have minor versions

* A minor version increment of the game's pack version is backwards-compatible, meaning all packs made for previous iterations of the same major version will keep working

* Packs can set compatibility requirements on minor versions in case they rely on resources introduced in a minor version

pack breaking obsolete | Data pack format has been increased to 82.0.

pack breaking obsolete | Resource pack format has been increased to 65.0.

pack breaking obsolete | The supported_formats field in pack.mcmeta has been removed.

* If your pack declares support for a pack version with the previous format (data pack < 82 or resource pack < 65), it is still required.

* Otherwise, it is not allowed and must be removed.

pack | The pack_format field in pack.mcmeta is now optional.

* If your pack declares support for a pack version with the previous format (data pack < 82, resource pack < 65), it is still required.

pack breaking obsolete | Added required fields min_format and max_format in pack.mcmeta that specifies the minimum and maximum version supported.

* A full version is specified as a list of two integers, e.g [74, 1]/

* Specifying a si

entries.title: misode 25w32a technical changes
entries.summary: pack breaking obsolete | Data pack format has been increased to 83.0.

metadata.preview:
pack breaking obsolete | Data pack format has been increased to 83.0.

pack breaking obsolete | Resource pack format has been increased to 65.1

entity nbt | Changed the copper_golem entity NBT. The weather_state field now expects a string id instead of integer id 0 -> unaffected, 1 -> exposed, 2 -> weathered, 3 -> oxidized.

text | Added object text component, which will display a single sprite from sprite atlas as a character. Sprites are always rendered as a rectangle, 8x8 pixels in size. It has two fields atlas and sprite.

loot | Added harvest/sweet_berry_bush loot table for drops when a sweet berry bush is harvested by interacting with it.

tag data | Added block tags #chains, #lanterns, and #bars.

tag data | Added item tags #chains, #lanterns, and #bars.

assets | Added new block sprites:

* copper_bars

* copper_chain

* copper_lantern

* copper_torch

* exposed_copper_bars

* exposed_copper_chain

* exposed_copper_lantern

* exposed_copper_torch

* oxidized_copper_bars

* oxidized_copper_chain

* oxidized_copper_lantern

* oxidized_copper_torch

* weathered_copper_bars

* weathered_copper_chain

* weathered_copper_lantern

* weathered_copper_torch

assets | Added new item

entries.title: misode 25w33a technical changes
entries.summary: pack obsolete | Data pack format has been increased to 83.1.

metadata.preview:
pack obsolete | Data pack format has been increased to 83.1.

pack obsolete | Resource pack format has been increased to 65.2.

blockstate | Added align_items_to_bottom block state property to the shelf block:

* If false (default) the items on the shelf will ignore the vertical translation of the on_shelf item display transform and will be rendered vertically aligned to the middle of the shelf.

* If true the items on the shelf will be rendered upward from the bottom of the shelf and will respect the vertical translation of the on_shelf item display transform.

attribute | Changed how the run_command click event works for commands that required a signed message (/say, /me, /msg, /tell, /w, /teammsg, /tm). Now it will show a screen that lets the user insert the command into the chat window.

enchantment | Changed explode enchantment effect. Added field block_effects, which can specify per-block particles. It is a list of entries with fields weight, particle, scaling, and speed.

tag | Added #shearable_from_copper_golem item tag, containing all items that can be removed from the copper golem's head slot via shears.

assets | Added a new texture environment/end_flash.png.

assets | A

entries.title: misode 25w34a technical changes
entries.summary: pack breaking obsolete | Data pack format has been increased to 84.0.

metadata.preview:
pack breaking obsolete | Data pack format has been increased to 84.0.

pack breaking obsolete | Resource pack format has been increased to 66.0.

command | Added fetchprofile command for downloading player profiles. Works asynchronously and prints results when finished. Syntax:

* fetchprofile name <player name> - resolves profile by name (case-insensitive).

* fetchprofile id <uuid> - resolves profile by id.

blockstate block-entity nbt | Replaced align_items_to_bottom shelf block state property with an equally named boolean field on the block entity.

component block-entity breaking | The profile data component no longer resolve profiles. It now has two behaviors:

* Static: when it has properties field or when both name and id are present or when both are missing.

* Dynamic: when it has either name or id (but not both).

block-entity breaking | Changed skull block entity. The profile field has been changed to match the profile data component. It is also now immutable and is resolved only when necessary.

text | Changed the object text component. Bold and italics styles are now ignored when drawing sprite.

entries.title: misode 25w35a technical changes
entries.summary: pack breaking obsolete | Data pack format has been increased to 85.0.

metadata.preview:
pack breaking obsolete | Data pack format has been increased to 85.0.

pack breaking obsolete | Resource pack format has been increased to 67.0.

network | Added a server management API (JSON-RPC over WebSocket) for dedicated servers.

options breaking | Removed allow-nether server property in favor of new game rule allowEnteringNetherUsingPortals.

options breaking | Removed spawn-monsters server property in favor of new game rule spawnMonsters.

options breaking | Removed enable-command-block server property in favor of new game rule enableCommandBlocks.

options breaking | Removed pvp server property in favor of new game rule pvp.

options | Added management-server-enabled server property, which defaults to false. Controls whether the Minecraft Server Management Protocol is enabled.

options | Added management-server-port server property, which defaults to 25585. Controls the port for the Minecraft Server Management Protocol.

options | Added management-server-host server property, which defaults to localhost. Controls the host for the Minecraft Server Management Protocol.

options | Added status-heartbeat-interval server property, which defaults to 0. Controls the interval for

entries.title: misode 25w36a technical changes
entries.summary: pack breaking obsolete | Data pack format has been increased to 86.0.

metadata.preview:
pack breaking obsolete | Data pack format has been increased to 86.0.

pack breaking obsolete | Resource pack format has been increased to 68.0.

dimension breaking | The world border is now dimension-specific. Each dimension now has its own separate world border configuration.

entity | Added mannequin entity type which can only be spawned via the /summon command. This is a player avatar entity without a connected player.

particle | The dragon_breath particle now optionally takes a power parameter (float, defaults to 1.0), which is multiplied onto its initial velocity after all randomness.

particle | The instant_effect and effect particles now optionally take power (float, defaults to 1.0) and color (rgb, defaults to 0xFFFFFF) parameters.

particle breaking | The flash particle now requires a color parameter (argb).

shader | Removed unused shaders core/position_color_lightmap.vsh, core/position_color_lightmap.fsh, core/position_color_tex_lightmap.vsh, and core/position_color_tex_lightmap.fsh.

entries.title: misode 25w37a technical changes
entries.summary: pack breaking obsolete | Data pack format has been increased to 87.0.

metadata.preview:
pack breaking obsolete | Data pack format has been increased to 87.0.

pack breaking obsolete | Resource pack format has been increased to 69.0.

debug | Some debug features that were previously removed during compilation are now preserved and can be used by players.

gamerule breaking | Changed name of gamerule enableCommandBlocks to commandBlocksEnabled.

assets | Moved the result slot of gui/container/villager.png up by one pixel.

shader | A new PER_FACE_LIGHTING flag has been added to the core/entity.vsh and core/entity.fsh shaders. When set, cardinal lighting will be computed separately for front- and back-faces.

shader breaking | Changed shader version from 150 to 330 for all shaders, as OpenGL 3.3 is now required.
